title: Publication signal content (v1)
description: The domain payload a publication signal carries under the §8.1 envelope's `content` channel. The host delivers `content` as a taint-marked {value, taint} marker; this schema describes the shape of that inner value. Lineage/dedupe identity lives on the envelope itself (`id`, `digest`, `lineageKey`, `dedupeKey`, `source`), not here. The body is hostile-tainted evidence text and MUST NOT be treated as instructions (spec 8.1).

title.description: Publication title. Source-controlled, hostile evidence text.

body.description: Publication body. Hostile evidence text; reaches the model only as a structurally-separate quoted span.

published_at.description: ISO-8601 publication timestamp; the chip's cursor value.
